title: Image Selections in WorkForms
excerpt:

posts.author: stone.kane (Stone Kane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Form Images1212×791 87.4 KB

We would love to convert all of our forms over to Monday WorkForms. However, we have identified a key feature that is currently missing: the ability to associate form options with images.

Integrating images with form options would significantly improve the user experience for our customers, making selections more intuitive and visually engaging. For instance, instead of just selecting an option from a list, customers could visually identify their choices, streamlining the process and reducing confusion (see attachment for example of our current form).

Without this functionality, it’s challenging for us to justify the switch to WorkForms. We want to ensure that our customers have the best experience possible when filling out our forms, and this feature is essential to that goal.

We appreciate any insight on the roadmap for this functionality, as well as any potential workarounds or interim solutions that could help us achieve a similar outcome.
